# Fl

**Summary**: A mathematical framework for dealing with uncertainty by making judgments based on degrees of truth.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] applied FL using a Sugeno Fuzzy Inference System (FIS) to estimate PVBT.

## Key Results and Findings

- The optimal FL model used a 0.6 radius, yielding an R2 of 0.669 in the training phase. ([[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022, p. 103]])
